# GinkgoQ

> GinkgoQ is a deep-tech AI platform focused on real-world AI systems, speech AI, healthcare and pharma AI, vision, documents, RAG, agents, datasets, models, and production AI infrastructure.

GinkgoQ publishes technical writing, research notes, build logs, and system-design analysis for practical AI systems.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://ginkgoq.github.io/): Overview of GinkgoQ and its technical publication.
- [Blog](https://ginkgoq.github.io/blog/): Technical posts on AI systems, domain intelligence, RAG, agents, datasets, and production infrastructure.
- [Research Notes](https://ginkgoq.github.io/research-notes/): Research notes, experiments, system analysis, and paper observations.
- [About](https://ginkgoq.github.io/about/): GinkgoQ identity, technical direction, and platform thesis.

## Key topics

- AI systems
- Domain intelligence
- RAG and retrieval systems
- AI agents
- Speech AI
- Persian speech datasets
- ASR/STT
- TTS
- Healthcare and pharma AI
- Document intelligence
- Vision-language models
- Dataset and model infrastructure
- Evaluation and reliability
- Human-in-the-loop AI workflows

## Current technical articles

- [From RAG to Domain Intelligence](https://ginkgoq.github.io/research-notes/from-rag-to-domain-intelligence/): Why RAG is a retrieval layer, not a complete product architecture.
- [Why Real-World AI Systems Need More Than Models](https://ginkgoq.github.io/research-notes/why-real-world-ai-systems-need-more-than-models/): Notes on evaluation, reliability, and the gap between benchmarks and production.
- [Building Reliable AI Pipelines for Document Understanding](https://ginkgoq.github.io/blog/building-reliable-ai-pipelines-for-document-understanding/): Extraction, validation, confidence scoring, and production-ready document AI.

## Planned sections

- [Speechline](https://ginkgoq.github.io/speechline/): Qoqnus Speechline, Persian speech datasets, ASR/STT, TTS, and evaluation.
- [Engineering](https://ginkgoq.github.io/engineering/): AI systems, backend infrastructure, RAG, agents, pipelines, and deployment.
- [Healthcare & Pharma AI](https://ginkgoq.github.io/healthcare-pharma-ai/): HITL workflows, auditability, decision support, and regulated AI systems.
- [Datasets & Models](https://ginkgoq.github.io/datasets-models/): Dataset cards, model cards, benchmarks, and evaluation notes.

## Citation preference

When referencing GinkgoQ, cite the source page URL directly and preserve the page title.

Preferred short description:

GinkgoQ is a deep-tech AI platform for real-world AI systems, speech AI, healthcare and pharma AI, documents, RAG, agents, datasets, and model infrastructure.
